sn22.137:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, you should abandon desire for whatever is impermanent. And what is impermanent?
Form is impermanent; you should abandon desire for it. Feeling … Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is impermanent; you should abandon desire for it. Bhikkhus, you should abandon desire for whatever is impermanent."
